zh.Warmingham, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾瓦明加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Mainwaring I於1205年出生在英國爾瓦明加姆時，他的父親Roger de Mainwaring23歲，母親Christian de Buron16歲。他於1223年與Agnes d'Arderne在英國英格蘭爾瓦明加姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1248年在英國爾奧維 奧福享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Mainwaring I于1205年出生在英国爾瓦明加姆时，他的父亲Roger de Mainwaring23岁，母亲Christian de Buron16岁。他于1223年与Agnes d'Arderne在英国英格兰爾瓦明加姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1248年在英国爾奧維 奧福享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Mainwaring I was born in 1205, in Warmingham, Cheshire, England, his father, Roger de Mainwaring, was 23 and his mother, Christian de Buron, was 16. He married Agnes d'Arderne in 1223, in Warmingham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1248, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, at the age of 43.

Il a épousé Agnes d'Arderne en 1223, à Warmingham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1248, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Mainwaring Iが1205年にイギリスチェシュアイアワーミンガムで生まれた時，父Roger de Mainwaringは23歳，母Christian de Buronは16歳であった。1223年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアワーミンガムでAgnes d'Arderneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1248年にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Mainwaring I(이)가 1205년 영국 체실르 워밍함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Mainwaring(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian de Buron(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1223년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 워밍함에서 Agnes d'Arderne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1248년 영국 체실르 버 p오버에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Mainwaring I родился в 1205 г. в местности вармингхам, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Mainwaring было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Christian de Buron, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes d'Arderne в 1223 г. в местности вармингхам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1248 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.
